meta.title: Gross-Net Calculator | Salary Calculator for Germany
meta.description: Calculate your net salary from gross income. Including income tax, solidarity surcharge and all social insurance contributions.

footer.disclaimer: Note: This calculator is for informational purposes only and does not constitute tax advice. The results are approximations and may differ from the actual payroll.
footer.copyright: Gross-Net Calculator · No guarantee for the accuracy of the calculations.

results.heading: Results
results.emptyState: Please enter a gross income greater than 0.

chart.incomeBreakdownCaption: Net income and deductions by gross income
chart.incomeBreakdownInfo: Shows how your salary splits into net pay and individual deductions at different gross income levels. The dashed line marks your current income.
chart.marginalInfo: Shows how much of each additional euro earned goes to taxes and contributions. At higher income, the net share decreases as the tax rate rises. Social insurance contributions are capped at the assessment ceiling.
chart.taxClassInfo: Compares your net income across all six tax classes with the same settings. Your current tax class is highlighted.
chart.taxClassCaption: Net income by tax class as bar chart
chart.effectiveRateInfo: Effective rate: what percentage of your total income goes to deductions. Marginal rate: what percentage of each additional euro is deducted. The two rates can cross, e.g. with PKV or tax class 6.
chart.effectiveRateCaption: Effective and marginal tax rate by income
chart.insuranceInfo: Compares your net income with public (GKV) and private (PKV) health insurance across different gross incomes. The lines may cross because GKV contributions are income-dependent while PKV premiums are fixed.
chart.insuranceCaption: Net income with GKV and PKV by gross income

table.info: Employee shows your share, Employer shows your employer's share. Total Deductions is the sum of all deductions from gross. Net is what lands in your bank account.
